documentation.description:
RFC 4253, RFC 4252, RFC 4254: SSH Client Session

Orchestrates the three protocol layers (Transport, Authentication,
Connection) into a single client-side session.  Provides:

  Process_Payload              -- pure-protocol dispatch (no I/O)
  Perform_KEX                  -- convenience: KEX + service setup
  Authenticate                 -- convenience: user authentication
  Establish_Connection_Service -- convenience: activate connection layer
  Connection pass-throughs     -- delegate to Connection.Client_Sessions

SPARK_Mode is ON at package level.  I/O-driven procedures
(Perform_KEX, Authenticate, Establish_Connection_Service) explicitly
disable SPARK_Mode.  All other procedures are SPARK-verifiable.
